title: Saker Cordless Leaf Blower Portable Dust Cleaner Handheld Blower 180000 RPM with Adjustable Speed for Lawn Care and Dust Patio Cleaning 2 Batteries Green with Case
features: 【Versatile Functionality】The Saker portable cordless leaf blower is designed for a variety of tasks. It’s perfect not only for car drying, but also for outdoor activities like camping and barbecuing. Additionally, it excels in household cleaning tasks such as dust removal and leaf blowing, making it a practical and convenient tool for all your cleaning needs.

【【Powerful Cleaning Performance】Delivering a robust airflow of 260 CFM and a wind speed of 34 m/s, this leaf blower offers powerful and efficient cleaning for leaves, debris, and grass clippings. Its lightweight design makes it easy to use for both garden and driveway cleaning, suitable for both home and professional use.

【Wind Power Adjustment】The Saker cordless leaf blower features easy wind power adjustment. By simply pressing the switch, the airflow increases or decreases based on the pressure applied. This allows you to control the wind force to suit different tasks, giving you the flexibility to meet various cleaning needs.

【Compact & Portable Design】The Saker handheld jet dry fan cleaner is compact and lightweight. The cordless design eliminates the hassle of tangled wires and gives you flexibility while carrying it for camping or traveling without adding any extra weight.

【What's Included】The Saker cordless leaf blower kit comes with: 1 x Saker cordless leaf blower, 2 x 21V 4000mAh rechargeable batteries, and 1 x charger，1 pair of earplugs，1x Case. The two batteries ensure you can complete large-scale cleaning tasks without worrying about running out of power.
